zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg於大約1100年出生時，他的父親Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt31歲，母親Eilika Billung von Sachsen20歲。他於1124年與Sophie von Winzenburg在德國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年11月18日享年71歲，埋葬在德國安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg于大约1100年出生时，他的父亲Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt31岁，母亲Eilika Billung von Sachsen20岁。他于1124年与Sophie von Winzenburg在德国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1170年11月18日享年71岁，埋葬在德国安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 巴倫斯泰特巴倫斯泰特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: 'der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Bär'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg was born about 1100, his father, Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt, was 31 and his mother, Eilika Billung von Sachsen, was 20. He married Sophie von Winzenburg in 1124, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 18 November 1170, at the age of 71, and was buried in Ballenstedt, Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg est né environ 1100, son père, Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eilika Billung von Sachsen, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Sophie von Winzenburg en 1124, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1170, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg um 1100 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt 31 und seine Mutter Eilika Billung von Sachsen 20. Er hat 1124 in Deutschland Sophie von Winzenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 18. November 1170 im Alter von 71 Jahren und wurde in Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg è nato il circa 1100, il suo padre, Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eilika Billung von Sachsen, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Sophie von Winzenburg nel 1124, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 18 novembre 1170, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburgが約1100年に生まれた時，父Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedtは31歳，母Eilika Billung von Sachsenは20歳であった。1124年にドイツでSophie von Winzenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年11月18日に71歳で死去し，ドイツアンハルトランドクレイス ボーレンステトボーレンステトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg(이)가 대략 1100년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eilika Billung von Sachsen(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1124년 독일에서 Sophie von Winzenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 11월 18일 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 아할트 랜드크레이스 바렌스테드트 바렌스테드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1100, seu pai, Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eilika Billung von Sachsen, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophie von Winzenburg em 1124, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1170, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg родился около 1100 г., его отцу по имени Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eilika Billung von Sachsen, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie von Winzenburg в 1124 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 18 ноября 1170 г. в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности балленстедт, ландкрис балленстедт, анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albrecht I. 'der Bär' von Brandenburg nació aproximadamente 1100, su papá, Otto 'der Reiche' Graf von Ballenstedt, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eilika Billung von Sachsen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sophie von Winzenburg en 1124, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1170, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Ballenstedt, Landkreis Ballenstedt, Anhalt, Alemania.
